title: Introduction to Fractions
subject: Mathematics
learning_objectives: Identify fractions as parts of a whole
Compare simple fractions using visual models

procedure.introductory_activity: Show a whole object (apple) and divide it into equal parts. Ask students what they observe.
procedure.main_activity: Using fraction circles, demonstrate 1/2, 1/4, and 1/3. Guide students in identifying and naming each fraction.
procedure.closing_activity: Quick assessment: students draw and label a fraction of their choice on mini whiteboards.

assessment: Formative: observation during fraction circle activity. Summative: 5-item worksheet on identifying fractions.
remarks: Differentiation: provide additional fraction manipulatives for struggling learners.
